status.pending: Waiting for approval. We review every organisation request by hand. Until it is approved, only you can see this page and invites are switched off.
status.suspended: This organisation is suspended. The page is hidden from non-members and membership changes are switched off. Contact support@thesuperhe.ro if you think this is a mistake.

stats.hoursFine: Hours from this organisation's own projects, plus public-project hours its members chose to share.

edit.logoHint: Square works best — shown on the page and on project cards.
edit.bannerHint: Wide image for the top of this page (about 1600×400).
edit.listedHint: Listed organisations appear on the Organisations page for everyone. Unlisted ones can still be reached by link or invite.

projects.title: Organisation projects
projects.needsHelp: {count, plural, one {# needs help} other {# need help}}

empty.membersFilter: No members-only projects yet. Any member can start one.
empty.member: No projects yet. Any member can start one.

teaser.title: Members see more.
teaser.body: The member list, members-only projects and the contribution dashboard are visible to members of {org}. Membership is by invitation.
teaser.signInAccept: Sign in to accept the invite
teaser.signInUse: Sign in to use an invite code

dash.title: Contributions
dash.empty: No hours logged yet. Hours appear here as members log time on project steps.
dash.method: Worked out from when hours were logged, each person’s membership dates, and their sharing setting.
dash.sharedLegend: Shared public contributions — {hours} hrs (members who opted in)
dash.footnote: Includes hours from former members from when they were members — they appear as “Former member” in exports and never in the member list. Members choose whether to share their public-project hours in <link>profile settings</link>.
dash.sharedRowVis: Other projects · members who share their hours

members.title: Members
members.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from {org}? Their past hours stay in the organisation's totals.

invites.title: Invites
invites.copyFailed: Could not copy — copy the code by hand instead.
invites.emailBody: Sends an in-app invitation to an existing account. If they are not on The Superhero yet, you will get a code to share with them.
invites.sent: Invitation sent — they will see it in their notifications.
invites.shareCode: No account with that email yet. Share this code with them: {code}

list.title: Your organisations.
list.intro: The groups you belong to on The Superhero — each with its own page, members-only projects and contribution totals.
list.emptyBody: Join one from the directory below or with an invite link from its admins — or bring your own group onto the platform with the request button above. We approve each organisation by hand.
list.rowMeta: {members, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} · {projects, plural, one {# project} other {# projects}} · joined {joined}
list.footer: Control what each organisation sees of your hours in your <link>profile settings</link>.

directory.heading: Directory
directory.empty: No organisations have listed themselves yet.
directory.meta: {members, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} · {projects, plural, one {# public project} other {# public projects}}

requestPage.title: Bring your organisation.
requestPage.intro: An organisation page gives your group a public face, private members-only projects, and a shared record of the hours your people contribute. We approve each request by hand to keep impersonators out.

request.typeQuestion: What kind of organisation is it?
request.nonprofitDescription: Associations, cooperatives, schools, community groups. Free — the test is whether the organisation exists to make a profit for its owners.
request.companyDescription: Businesses that want employees contributing on work time, with contribution reporting. Paid — we will contact you about pricing.
request.typeHint: We confirm the type during review — the legal form matters less than whether the organisation exists to make a profit.
request.useLabel: How do you plan to use it?
request.usePlaceholder: A sentence or two: who you are, and what your organisation would do here.
request.useHint: This becomes the first draft of your organisation’s About text — you can change it any time.
request.listedLabel: List in the directory once approved
request.listedHint: Listed organisations appear on the Organisations page for everyone. You can change this any time.
request.genericError: Something went wrong sending the request. Try again.
request.imageNotSaved: {image, select, logo {The logo was not saved: {error}} other {The banner was not saved: {error}}}
request.imageUploadFailed: {image, select, logo {The logo could not be uploaded — you can add it later from “Edit organisation”.} other {The banner could not be uploaded — you can add it later from “Edit organisation”.}}
request.doneBody: We review every organisation by hand — usually within a few days. Until then, only you can see <link>your organisation page</link>. We will contact you by email if we have questions.

profileOrgs.title: Your organisations.
profileOrgs.intro: For each organisation, you choose whether it can count your hours on other public projects in its totals and reports. Hours on an organisation’s own projects always count. What you do outside these projects is never shared without this setting.
profileOrgs.empty: You are not in any organisation yet. Join one with an invite code on its page.
profileOrgs.leaveConfirm: Leave {org}? Your past hours stay in the organisation's totals, but you will no longer appear in the member list.
profileOrgs.footer: Want to bring your own group onto The Superhero? <link>Request an organisation</link> — we approve each one by hand.
